# MRC GlobalPay
> Registered Canadian MSB (C100000015) providing non-custodial, registration-free crypto-to-crypto settlement and micro-swaps.

## Core Capabilities
- [Instant Swap](https://mrcglobalpay.com/) - Non-custodial exchange for 1,200+ assets starting at $0.30.
- [Exchange Pairs](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/btc-to-eth) - 50,000+ tradeable pair pages with live rates, step-by-step guides, and network details.
- [Private Transfer](https://mrcglobalpay.com/private-transfer) - Shielded routing for cross-chain transactions without on-chain linkage.
- [Permanent Bridge](https://mrcglobalpay.com/permanent-bridge) - Automated, recurring liquidity for miners and corporate treasuries.
- [Loan](https://mrcglobalpay.com/lend) - Crypto-collateralized loans without selling assets, LTV-driven credit facility.
- [Earn](https://mrcglobalpay.com/lend) - Daily compounding yield via Peer-to-Institutional lending with 150% over-collateralization.
- [Invoice](https://mrcglobalpay.com/?tab=request) - Issue crypto invoices with 168-hour rate lock and 0.5% settlement fee.

## Technical Specifications
- **Settlement Time:** Median <60 seconds.
- **Liquidity:** Aggregated from 700+ sources.
- **Compliance:** FINTRAC-registered MSB (C100000015); non-custodial architecture (no user funds held).
- **Minimums:** Micro-swaps enabled from $0.30 USD equivalent.
- **Supported Pairs:** 1,200+ assets × 1,200+ assets = 50,000+ valid trading combinations.
- **Languages:** 13 languages (EN, ES, PT, FR, JA, FA, UR, HE, AF, HI, VI, TR, UK).

## Popular Exchange Pairs
- [BTC to ETH](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/btc-to-eth) - Swap Bitcoin to Ethereum instantly.
- [SOL to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/sol-to-usdt) - Swap Solana to Tether instantly.
- [ETH to SOL](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/eth-to-sol) - Bridge Ethereum to Solana.
- [XRP to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/xrp-to-usdt) - Swap XRP to Tether.
- [BTC to USDC](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/btc-to-usdc) - Swap Bitcoin to USDC.
- [USDT to TRX](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/usdt-to-trx) - Swap Tether to TRON.
- [DOGE to BTC](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/doge-to-btc) - Swap Dogecoin to Bitcoin.
- [ADA to ETH](https://mrcglobalpay.com/exchange/ada-to-eth) - Swap Cardano to Ethereum.

## Key Resources
- [Trust & Security Hub](https://mrcglobalpay.com/transparency-security) - Transparency and compliance documentation.
- [Developer Hub](https://mrcglobalpay.com/developers) - API documentation for exchange widgets and integrations.
- [Blog](https://mrcglobalpay.com/blog) - Expert guides, market analysis, and security insights.
- [Compare Exchanges](https://mrcglobalpay.com/compare) - Side-by-side comparison with competing exchanges.
- [Solutions Directory](https://mrcglobalpay.com/solutions) - Step-by-step swap guides for specific token pairs.
- [Trust Hub (Learn)](https://mrcglobalpay.com/learn) - Educational articles on crypto concepts.
- [Network Status](https://mrcglobalpay.com/status) - Real-time operational status of swap networks.

## Institutional Whitepapers
- [Crypto-Collateralized Liquidity Solutions](https://mrcglobalpay.com/blog/whitepapers/crypto-loans) - Non-custodial lending framework under FINTRAC MSB regulation.
- [Digital Asset Yield Engine](https://mrcglobalpay.com/blog/whitepapers/digital-yield) - Institutional-grade interest accrual and risk management.
- [Liquidity Expansion Q2 2026](https://mrcglobalpay.com/liquidity-expansion) - ZkSync USDC, USDS, EDGE, and Aptos CAKE integrations.
- [Sovereign Settlement](https://mrcglobalpay.com/sovereign-settlement) - Stateless invoicing and cross-chain bridge architecture.
- [Bridge Whitepaper](https://mrcglobalpay.com/permanent-bridge/whitepaper) - Infrastructure persistence and automated settlement rails.
- [Shielded Settlement](https://mrcglobalpay.com/private-transfer/whitepaper) - On-chain identity decoupling and privacy sovereignty.
- [Aurora Ecosystem Partnership](https://mrcglobalpay.com/blog/aurora-ecosystem-mrc-globalpay-swap-aurora) - MRC GlobalPay verified swap partner for AURORA native and ERC-20 tokens, NEAR Intents cross-chain execution.

- [RSS Feed](https://mrcglobalpay.com/rss.xml) - Blog post syndication feed.
